summary: 0.6.37 resets visible playback progress immediately when Next or Previous changes movies so the new media starts from a clean beginning state instead of carrying stale timeline visibility through prepare.
operatorSignals: A-B was clearing on playlist navigation, but progress still looked like it was being carried into the next movie.
The lane needed a boring media-change reset instead of another transport policy layer.
actionsTaken: Raw player loads now zero the video timeline immediately when a different media path is loaded.
Hosted player loads now reset seek, timeline, and A-B state consistently before preparing a new media path.
Visible runtime readback now reports zero timeline while a new movie is still preparing.
nonGoals: No slider/text display state wiring yet.
